faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Carle Place typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, and the number of treatments required. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants versus regular ants?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ants are larger than typical household ants (up to 3/4 inch long) and are usually black or dark brown. You may notice wood shavings (frass) near baseboards, hear rustling sounds in walls, or see winged ants in spring. Our experts can positively identify the species during inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in Carle Place?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Carle Place and Nassau County. Most treatments begin showing results within 24-48 hours, with complete colony elimination typically achieved within 2-4 weeks depending on infestation severity.

faqs.question: Will carpenter ants return after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes preventive measures and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We offer warranty protection and will return at no additional charge if carpenter ants reappear within the guarantee period. We also provide recommendations to eliminate moisture issues and wood-to-soil contact that attract carpenter ants.
